nodes.label: Lawyer UI Audit Report
nodes.description: Arabic RTL HTML scorecard evaluating Sanad's lawyer-facing features (dashboard, compliance tracker, kanban cases) with done/partial/missing/critical badges.

nodes.label: Compliance Tracker
nodes.description: Tracks residency, commercial registry, insurance, and tax compliance items; supports view/add/renew but lacks edit/delete and attachments.

nodes.label: Cases Kanban Board
nodes.description: Drag-and-drop board across four case stages; missing case detail page, edit/delete, and structured client relations.
